title: Terra Moment
description: Inspired by Terraria, added many interesting events such as Blood Moon, TorchGod, Slime Rain
body:
Inspired by Terraria, added many interesting events such as Blood Moon, Torch God, Slime Rain

The target will also continue to add all the events of Terraria




Completed Event
- Blood Moon
- Torch God
- Slime Rain
